use rayon::ThreadPool;

// GOOD: library accepts host-provided pool or uses the global default
pub struct Processor {
    pool: Option<ThreadPool>,
}

impl Processor {
    pub fn new() -> Self {
        Self { pool: None }
    }

    pub fn with_pool(pool: ThreadPool) -> Self {
        Self { pool: Some(pool) }
    }

    pub fn process_data(&self, data: &[u8]) -> Vec<u8> {
        match &self.pool {
            Some(pool) => pool.install(|| data.par_iter().map(|b| b.wrapping_add(1)).collect()),
            None => data.par_iter().map(|b| b.wrapping_add(1)).collect(),
        }
    }
}
